name: fullstack-template
description: Production-ready fullstack template with DevOps infrastructure

scripts.dev:all: docker compose --profile redis --profile worker --profile temporal up
scripts.reset: docker compose down -v --remove-orphans && docker system prune -af --volumes
scripts.db:erd: cd services/backend/app && PYTHONPATH=../../.. uv run python ../../../scripts/generate_erd.py ../../../docs/erd.svg
scripts.db:migrate: docker compose exec backend uv run alembic -c /packages/db/alembic.ini upgrade head
scripts.db:rollback: docker compose exec backend uv run alembic -c /packages/db/alembic.ini downgrade -1
scripts.db:reset: docker compose exec backend uv run alembic -c /packages/db/alembic.ini downgrade base && docker compose exec backend uv run alembic -c /packages/db/alembic.ini upgrade head
scripts.db:create: docker compose exec backend uv run alembic -c /packages/db/alembic.ini revision --autogenerate -m
scripts.db:history: docker compose exec backend uv run alembic -c /packages/db/alembic.ini history
scripts.db:current: docker compose exec backend uv run alembic -c /packages/db/alembic.ini current
scripts.test:backend: docker compose exec backend uv run pytest
scripts.test:backend:unit: docker compose exec backend uv run pytest tests/unit -v
scripts.test:backend:integration: docker compose exec backend uv run pytest tests/integration -v
scripts.test:backend:cov: docker compose exec backend uv run pytest --cov=. --cov-report=term-missing
scripts.test:frontend: docker compose exec frontend pnpm test:run
scripts.temporal:ui: open http://localhost:8233 || xdg-open http://localhost:8233 || echo 'Open http://localhost:8233 in your browser'
